title: Thunder Below
writer: Sidney Buchman, Josephine Lovett, Thomas Rourke
actors: Tallulah Bankhead, Charles Bickford, Paul Lukas
plot: Thunder Below is a 1932 American Pre-Code drama film directed by Richard Wallace and written by Sidney Buchman and Josephine Lovett. The film stars Tallulah Bankhead, Charles Bickford, Paul Lukas, Eugene Pallette, Ralph Forbes and...
